spider.name: Spider Walk
instructions: Move to the next string and repeat

permutation.name: Permutation Trainer
instructions: Play the pattern across all strings

stringskip.name: String Skipping
instructions: Play on string 6, then skip to 4

legato.name: Legato Builder
instructions: Play first note with a pick

settings.title: Settings
settings.dailyModeHint: Daily challenge selects a fixed pattern for today.
settings.stickyFingersHint: Enabled by default in Permutation Trainer (Spider-style).

cueDetail.pickHighNoteAnchorIndex: Pick high note while index stays planted
cueDetail.keepIndexAnchored: Keep index anchored and release down

unbreakableFocus.title: Unbreakable Focus
unbreakableFocus.description: Achieve a streak of 20 correct answers

earTraining.title: Ear Training
earTraining.description: Complete a session in Ear Training

rhythmMastery.title: Rhythm Mastery
rhythmMastery.description: Complete a session in Rhythm Dojo

flawlessExecution.title: Flawless Execution
flawlessExecution.description: Achieve a streak of 50 correct answers

page.toolNotFoundDesc: This theory tool is not available.

chordLibrary.notFound: No chord data for this selection.

intervalFretboard.title: Intervals on Fretboard
intervalFretboard.description: Find the note that matches the target interval from the root.

triads.needsFiveStrings: This tool needs at least five strings in the current tuning.
triads.legendBody: Colors mark inversion type, while R/3/5 labels show chord tones.

caged.legend: CAGED connects five open chord shapes across the neck. Toggle shapes to see how they overlap for any root.

library.title: Train
library.description: One catalog for fretboard drills, technique, theory, ear training, and rhythm.
library.suggestedDesc1: Continue with the mode that feels easiest today, then add one harder block.
library.suggestedDesc2: Use short, focused sessions for faster retention.
library.suggestedDesc3: Smart defaults are enabled in pre-session setup.
library.noPinnedDesc: Pin your favorite drills with the star icon for quick access.

challenges.title: Challenges
challenges.description: Daily momentum, weekly goals, and long-term hunts.
challenges.huntsDesc: Long-term goals that stay available every day.

speed-20.name: Speed Sprint
speed-20.desc: Identify 20 notes as fast as possible

accuracy-50.name: Accuracy Master
accuracy-50.desc: Get 50 correct answers in a row

coverage-all.name: Full Coverage
coverage-all.desc: Practice at least one note on every string

timed-blitz.name: 60s Blitz
timed-blitz.desc: Score as many correct answers as possible in 60 seconds

home.nextStepDescDefault: Start with a short fretboard drill to lock in note locations.
home.dailyQuestsDesc: Complete tasks to earn bonus XP
home.noPinnedDesc: Pin your favorites in Train for quick access here.
home.noRecentDesc: Open Train and pick a technique exercise to build consistency.

practice.title: Practice
practice.subtitle: Select a mode and configure your session

focus.pickTabPosition: Pick the matching tab position below

setup.title: Session Setup
setup.micDesc: Enable this to detect played guitar notes.
setup.scoredDesc: Auto-finishes after target count and shows summary.
setup.guitarDesc: Endless practice. No scoring or time limits.

modes.guessNoteDesc: Visual note identification on fretboard and tab.
modes.playPracticeDesc: Instrument-first practice with mic input support.
modes.fretboardToNoteDescription: Identify notes directly from fretboard positions.
modes.tabToNoteDescription: Read tablature and name the sounding note.
modes.noteToTabDescription: Map note names to accurate fretboard positions.
modes.playNotesDescription: Play prompted note names using live mic detection.
modes.playTabDescription: Play prompted tab positions in sequence.

tips.fretboardToNote: Identify the note shown on the highlighted fretboard position. Select the correct note name from the options.
tips.tabToNote: Standard tuning. Name the note at the fret shown on the tab.
tips.noteToTab: Find the correct position on the fretboard for the given note. You'll see a string and fret to select.
tips.playNotes: Use your guitar and microphone. Play the note shown on the screen.
tips.playTab: Use your guitar and microphone. Play the note at the position shown on the tab.

sessionSummary.title: Session Complete
sessionSummary.compactHint: The fretboard has 72 positions. Short, focused reps compound quickly.
sessionSummary.weakSpotFallback: Try a focused drill on one string range.

summary.firstSession: First session complete. Every note attempt builds your fretboard map.
summary.zeroAccuracy: You practiced for {{duration}} and attempted {{total}} notes. {{weakSpot}}
summary.decentButDown: Slightly below your previous session. A focused follow-up should recover momentum.
summary.personalBest: New personal best. Keep this pace and lock it in.
summary.improved: Solid improvement from your previous session.

support.personalBest: Personal best energy. If FretMemo helped you get here, a coffee tip helps fund the next drill and polish pass. No pressure.
support.firstSession: If this felt helpful, buying me a coffee helps me keep shipping drills, fixes, and articles. No pressure.
support.default: If this session was helpful, buying me a coffee helps fund new drills, fixes, and polish. No pressure.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Manage global defaults, module defaults, and safety controls.
settingsPage.scopeHint: Global defaults affect the whole app. Module defaults prefill specific training modes.

feedback.exportError: Could not export progress data. Please try again.
feedback.importError: Could not import progress data. Make sure the file is valid JSON.
feedback.resetProgressSuccess: All progress data has been reset.

resetSettings.title: Reset Settings?
resetSettings.description: This restores all app settings to defaults. Progress data will not be changed.

replaceImport.title: Replace Progress Data?
replaceImport.description: This will overwrite your current progress with imported data.

resetProgress.title: Reset All Progress Data?
resetProgress.description: This removes practice stats, session history, and unlocked achievements.

instrument.cardDescription: Configure instrument family, tuning, and handedness.
instrument.instrumentTypeHint: Changes available tuning presets and string count.
instrument.leftHandedHint: Mirror the fretboard for left-handed playing.
instrument.showFretNumbersHint: Display numbers on the fretboard visualization.
instrument.noteNamingHint: Choose sharps, flats, or random note naming.
instrument.randomizationHint: For random notation: keep one style per session or reshuffle each question.
instrument.accidentalComplexityHint: Advanced mode can include double sharps and flats in generated note exercises.

learning.cardDescription: Adjust how the application helps you learn.
learning.difficultyModeHint: Adaptive mode reacts to your results. Manual keeps fixed behavior.
learning.autoAdvanceHint: Automatically move to the next question after a correct answer.
learning.showHintsHint: Display markers or helpers when stuck.
learning.spacedRepetitionHint: Prioritize weak areas and older items.

audio.cardDescription: Manage sound output and microphone input.
audio.instrumentSoundHint: Used for generated tones and reference notes.
audio.pitchToleranceHint: Higher values make detection more forgiving.

appearance.cardDescription: Customize how FretMemo looks and feels.
appearance.themeHint: Choose light, dark, or follow your device preference.
appearance.defaultLayerHint: Used as the starting layer in Focus Mode.

gamification.showXpAnimationsHint: Show floating XP summaries after answers.
gamification.streakWarningsHint: Alert when streak is at risk of breaking.
gamification.achievementToastsHint: Show unlock notifications during practice sessions.
gamification.streakFreezesHint: Protect your streak if you miss a day.

modulePractice.cardDescription: Prefill Session Setup for fretboard practice modes.
modulePractice.metronomeDefaultHint: Enable click track automatically on session start.
modulePractice.defaultScaleTypeHint: Used when scale constraints are enabled.

moduleTraining.cardDescription: Module-specific defaults and persisted training calibration.

technique.bpmOverridesHint: Saved per exercise when tempo is adjusted in Technique mode.
technique.noOverrides: No exercise-specific starting BPM overrides yet.

ear.activeIntervalsHint: At least one interval must stay enabled.

rhythm.inputLatencyHint: Increase this if taps are consistently marked late despite feeling on-beat.

data.cardDescription: Export your practice data to JSON and import it later.
data.mergeVsReplace: Merge keeps current progress and adds imported data. Replace overwrites all current progress.
data.dangerDescription: Permanent actions affecting your learning history.

help.cardDescription: Quick access to FAQ, updates, and support.

soundToFretboard.title: Sound -> Fretboard
soundToFretboard.description: Hear the note and pick matching positions on the fretboard.
soundToFretboard.enableAudioHint: Tap start once to unlock audio.

intervals.description: Hear two notes and identify the interval.

chords.description: Hear the chord and identify its quality.

functional.description: Hear the key center and target tone, then pick the scale degree.
functional.autoNextDesc: Jump to the next prompt after each correct answer.
functional.listenPrompt: Listen first, then choose the degree.

tapBeat.title: Tap the Beat
tapBeat.description: Lock into the pulse and hit each beat in time.
tapBeat.sessionScoredDesc: Track hits, misses, and timing accuracy.
tapBeat.sessionPracticeDesc: Play freely with no scoring or stats.
tapBeat.practiceHint: Practice mode: stay with the click and keep the pulse steady.

strumPatterns.title: Strum Patterns
strumPatterns.description: Train common strumming grooves and picking direction control.
strumPatterns.practiceHint: Practice mode: loop the pattern and focus on consistent motion.

pop-rock.title: Pop Rock
pop-rock.description: Muted attack on beat 3 for drive.

rhythmReading.title: Rhythm Reading
rhythmReading.description: Read the pattern and place each attack in time.
rhythmReading.adaptiveTempoDesc: Automatically raise or lower tempo after each run.
rhythmReading.adaptiveTempoDown: Adaptive tempo: -{{delta}} BPM for cleaner timing (next run {{next}} BPM).
rhythmReading.sessionPracticeDesc: Read and play with no scoring.
rhythmReading.practiceHint: Practice mode: read the notation and play without scoring.

rr-l1-quarters-a.title: Quarter Pulse A
rr-l1-quarters-a.description: Steady quarter notes with one quarter rest.

rr-l2-eighths-a.title: Eighth Stream A
rr-l2-eighths-a.description: Simple eighths with one missing attack.

rr-l2-eighths-b.title: Eighth Stream B
rr-l2-eighths-b.description: Quarter and eighth combinations with rests.

grooveLab.title: Groove Lab
grooveLab.description: Build timing and strum-direction control with full groove contexts.
grooveLab.echoModeDesc: Listen first, then play the response phrase.
grooveLab.sessionScoredDesc: Score timing, direction, and groove control.
grooveLab.listenPhaseHint: Listen phase: absorb the groove before your response.
grooveLab.practiceHint: Practice mode: lock into the groove and refine your pulse.

shuffle-blues.title: Shuffle Blues
shuffle-blues.description: Triplet grid with a shuffle pocket.

reggae-offbeat.title: Reggae Offbeat
reggae-offbeat.description: Lean on offbeats and leave space.

bossa-nova.title: Bossa Nova
bossa-nova.description: Alternating bass pulse with light upstrokes.

ballad-12-8.title: 12/8 Ballad
ballad-12-8.description: Slow compound feel with flowing triplets.

funk-16th.title: Funk 16th
funk-16th.description: Tight sixteenth-note grid with muted attacks.

notFound.title: Rhythm mode not found
notFound.description: The requested rhythm mode does not exist.

comingSoon.body: This mode is queued for the next sprint. Start with Tap the Beat or Strum Patterns now.

latency.title: Input latency compensation
latency.description: Increase this if your taps are consistently marked late despite feeling on-beat.

progress.title: Progress
progress.emptyFretboardDesc: Start a short practice session to unlock it.
progress.emptyFunctionalDesc: Complete your first ear training session.
progress.focusAreasDesc: Positions that need the most work
progress.emptyFocusDesc: Play a few sessions to surface weak spots.
progress.resetConfirmDesc: This removes fretboard heatmap data from local memory. This action cannot be undone.

streak_7.name: Week Warrior
streak_7.desc: Practice for 7 days in a row

streak_30.name: Monthly Master
streak_30.desc: Practice for 30 days in a row

perfect_session.name: Perfect Session
perfect_session.desc: Get 20 correct answers in a row

accuracyChart.emptyTitle: Your accuracy trend appears here after 3+ sessions
accuracyChart.emptyDescription: Keep practicing consistently to unlock real progress insights.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Try refreshing or click retry.
